cmd:
python3 -c "
import json
# Update hypothesis
j = json.load(open('/tmp/.claude_reasoning_state.json'))
j['current_hypothesis'] = 'RBCD+S4U via FAKEPC\$ on RODC01\$ produces Administrator ticket, usable via SOCKS tunnel to read root.txt on RODC01'
j['commands_since_state_write'] = 0
json.dump(j, open('/tmp/.claude_reasoning_state.json','w'))
# Log state
from datetime import datetime, timezone
entry = {'hypothesis':'FAKEPC\$ created on .223, RBCD+S4U chain to get Admin ticket for RODC01 via SOCKS tunnel','branch':'socks-tunnel-rbcd-s4u-rodc01','action':'addcomputer.py FAKEPC\$ + rbcd.py delegate FAKEPC→RODC01','conclusion':'testing','ts':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}
with open('machines/garfield/state/tested.jsonl','a') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n')
print('State updated')
"

python3 -c "
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
# Update hypothesis
j = json.load(open('/tmp/.claude_reasoning_state.json'))
j['current_hypothesis'] = 'RBCD+S4U via FAKEPC on RODC01 produces Administrator ticket, usable via SOCKS tunnel to read root.txt'
j['commands_since_state_write'] = 0
json.dump(j, open('/tmp/.claude_reasoning_state.json','w'))
# Log state
entry = {'hypothesis':'SOCKS tunnel + RBCD S4U chain for RODC01 root','branch':'socks-tunnel-rbcd-s4u-rodc01','action':'Step 1: FAKEPC created. Step 2: RBCD + getST next.','conclusion':'testing','ts':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}
with open('/htb/machines/garfield/state/tested.jsonl','a') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n')
print('done')
"
which chisel 2>/dev/null || find / -name "chisel*" 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "chisel not found"

echo "chisel not found, checking alternatives" && which ligolo-ng 2>/dev/null || which socat 2>/dev/null || echo "socat: $(which socat 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found')" && apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E 'chisel|ligolo|socat|proxychains' 2>/dev/null

# Get chisel for linux (our box) and windows (DC01)
cd /tmp && curl -sL https://github.com/jpillora/chisel/releases/download/v1.10.1/chisel_1.10.1_linux_amd64.gz -o chisel_linux.gz && gunzip chisel_linux.gz && chmod +x chisel_linux && curl -sL https://github.com/jpillora/chisel/releases/download/v1.10.1/chisel_1.10.1_windows_amd64.gz -o chisel_win.gz && gunzip chisel_win.gz && mv chisel_win chisel.exe && ls -la chisel_linux chisel.exe && apt-get install -y proxychains4 2>&1 | tail -3
